prompt: A white Toyota HiLux ute with a sophisticated partial vehicle wrap featuring large stacked L and K letters in a high-contrast serif typeface like Didot or Bodoni, with dramatic thick-thin strokes and elegant hairline serifs. The serif LK is rendered in charcoal (#2C2C2C) on the front doors, commanding and editorial. A thin gold (#C9A96E) horizontal line separates LK from DESIGN AND BUILD in small widely-spaced sans-serif below. The rear quarter panel shows 0481 742 026 and lkdesignandbuild.com.au in charcoal. The wrap uses a charcoal, white, and gold color scheme, refined and elegant. The ute is parked on an Adelaide suburban street with eucalyptus trees and neat houses. Bright daylight, professional vehicle photography.
negative_prompt: full wrap, busy graphics, neon colors, cheap vinyl, bubbles in wrap, dirty vehicle, ugly background, industrial area, nighttime, cartoon, illustration, low quality, casual fonts

settings.depth_of_field: medium, vehicle sharp, background slightly soft
